_comment: Per-competition club overrides for anglers who changed clubs mid-season. Schema: list of {season_id, comp_id, wp_no, club}. The override only applies to that specific competition's catches; the angler's anglers.club field stays as their current/latest club.

overrides.note: Ethan Woodman — at FOUR OCEANS until end of IC 2, then moved to TYGERBERG
